description_long: This object is a dark-colored shotgun with a compact, tactical design, featuring a prominent pistol grip and a relatively short barrel. The fore-end is ribbed, suggesting a pump-action mechanism, and the overall silhouette is blocky and angular, reminiscent of modern urban weaponry. The stock is absent, replaced by a pistol grip for maneuverability in close quarters. The trigger guard is rectangular and robust, providing protection for the trigger area. The barrel is single and unvented, with no visible ribbing or venting along the top. The entire surface appears matte and non-reflective, suitable for minimizing glare in urban environments.
description: A compact, dark shotgun with a pistol grip, ribbed pump fore-end, and a short, matte-finished barrel. The design is blocky and tactical, with a rectangular trigger guard and no visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the pistol grip, ribbed pump fore-end, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel opening and the width of the pump fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the features of view 0, with the pistol grip and pump fore-end clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the pistol grip and the overall slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rectangular, robust, medium-sized, no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
